generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had real civil defense drills? Those were the days when we actually prepared for emergencies. Now? Our leaders would rather spend billions on overseas adventures than ensure our communities are ready. It's not about being paranoid—it's about being prepared. Let's bring back common sense preparedness before it's too late. #CivilDefenseMatters #PreparedNotScared
